facebook.caption:
618 reviews. 4.4 stars. And most tourists walk straight past Nhà Xưa 68.

This local restaurant on Lý Thường Kiệt is where Phu Quoc residents actually eat. No beach-club markup. No English-only menu. Just real food, real portions, real prices.

If your Phu Quoc trip is all resorts and no streets, you're missing half the island.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
